title: Hotel California
funFacts: This song was written by [artist:Don Felder], [artist:Don Henley], and [artist:Glenn Frey]. The lyrics are often interpreted as a commentary on the excesses of the American dream and the dark side of the California lifestyle. The famous guitar solo at the end was played by both [artist:Don Felder] and [artist:Joe Walsh], creating a dueling guitars effect. The song appears on the album [album:Hotel California] from [date:1976].
